Book David
New Book

EVERY
DAY
COUNTS

By David Pollack

A powerful call to live with intention, purpose, and relentless gratitude for every opportunity. Stop coasting. Start competing — for the life you were made to live.

Order Your Copy Book the Talk
The Book

WHAT EVERY DAY COUNTS IS ABOUT

In Every Day Counts, David Pollack draws on his remarkable journey — from walk-on hopeful to All-American legend, from career-ending injury to national television — to deliver a message that has resonated with audiences across the country.

The book is a challenge and an invitation: to stop treating your days as ordinary, to show up fully, and to pursue the life God put you here to live. Each chapter is packed with honest reflection, practical discipline, and the kind of energy only David can bring.

The Challenge

THE 30-DAY
CHALLENGE

Built into every copy of Every Day Counts is a 30-day challenge designed to help readers put the book's principles into practice — one intentional day at a time.

Each day is a specific action, reflection, or discipline drawn from David's own playbook. Simple enough to do. Hard enough to matter.

30
Days to build the habits that change everything.
Experience It Live

EXPERIENCE EVERY DAY COUNTS LIVE

The book is great. The keynote is something else entirely. David brings Every Day Counts to life on stage with the energy, stories, and presence that only a live audience gets to experience. Invite David to speak at your next event.

Inquire About Booking
Also from David

THE WON'T QUIT KID

David partnered with Brave Books to tell a story about confidence, effort, and what it means to never give up — no matter how tough things get. Perfect for the young athlete in your life.
